label: Federal/National
completeness_requirements: Federal and Federal Agency Home Load and Down Payment Assistance Programs
HOME Investment Partnerships Program implementers and sub-grantees in target geography
GSE (FreddieNAc and FannieNae gome load and down payment assistance programs
CDBG-funded homebuyer assistance programs administered by local grantees
USDA Rural Development homeownership programs (Section 502 Direct, Section 502 Guaranteed, Section 504)
VA-related cash purchase assistance grants (ONLY where actual DPA cash disbursement exists — not VA loan guaranty itself)
HUD-approved housing counseling agencies as candidate entity pointers (not programs themselves)
Federal Native American housing programs (Section 184 Indian Home Loan Guarantee, NAHASDA) as candidate pointers to tribal entities
Record 'none found' with negative evidence for any category above that is truly absent in target geography

label: State HFA
completeness_requirements: State Housing Finance Agency (HFA) — all active DPA products (second mortgages, forgivable grants, deferred-payment loans)
State bond-funded first mortgage programs that bundle DPA as a companion product
HFA-administered special population products (veterans, educators, law enforcement, healthcare workers)
HFA sub-programs administered through participating lender networks
Any statewide purchase assistance programs operated outside the HFA (state treasury, department of housing)
Record 'none found' with negative evidence for any category above that is truly absent
search_hints: {STATE} housing finance agency + down payment assistance

label: Employer/Industry
completeness_requirements: Universities and colleges with 'Live Near Your Work' or employee homeownership assistance programs
Hospital systems and healthcare networks with workforce homebuyer assistance
Major private employers with employer-assisted housing (EAH) purchase aid
Public school districts with teacher/staff homebuyer programs
Unions and labor organizations with member down payment assistance or housing loan funds
Employer-funded programs administered through a nonprofit or CDFI intermediary
Record 'none found' with negative evidence for any category above that is truly absent in target geography

label: Nonprofit/CDFI
completeness_requirements: CDFIs operating down payment assistance loan funds or grant pools in target geography
NeighborWorks America affiliates with homebuyer assistance products
Habitat for Humanity affiliates with homeownership purchase assistance (not sweat equity only)
Housing partnerships and community land trusts with purchase assistance
Credit unions administering DPA pools or homebuyer grant programs
Nonprofit loan funds providing soft seconds or forgivable grants
Faith-based and community development organizations with verified DPA products
Record 'none found' with negative evidence for any category above that is truly absent
search_hints: {CITY}/{STATE} + credit union + down payment assistance pool

label: Tribal
completeness_requirements: Federally recognized tribal housing authorities operating homeownership assistance in or near target geography
Tribally Designated Housing Entities (TDHEs) with purchase assistance products
Section 184 Indian Home Loan Guarantee Program local implementers and lenders
NAHASDA-funded homeownership programs operated by tribal entities
Inter-tribal housing coalitions or regional Native housing organizations
Record 'none found' with negative evidence if no tribal entities operate in target geography

label: Municipal/County/PHA
completeness_requirements: City Community Development / Housing & Neighborhood Services / Housing Department DPA programs
County housing departments and Community Development offices with purchase assistance
Public Housing Authorities (PHAs) operating homeownership voucher or DPA programs
Redevelopment agencies and urban renewal authorities with homebuyer incentives
Land banks with owner-occupant purchase assistance or discount programs
Housing trust funds distributing DPA grants to homebuyers
Neighborhood revitalization offices with targeted homebuyer incentive zones
Special assessment districts or tax increment financing areas with homebuyer programs
Record 'none found' with negative evidence for any category above that is truly absent
